text.title: Team Methodology Overlay Mechanism Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team need to deviate from base faion corpus?

branch.question: Will deviations apply per-repo or per-user?

example.trace: input matches `deviation_needed == true` → sub-question → `scope == per_repo` → conclusion ref=`overlay-paths-named`.
